personal.name: Víctor Enrique Alcázar López
personal.title: Full Stack Developer
personal.summary:
Hey! You can take a look at my work at vikepic.com
My name is Víctor and I love technology and creating stuff with it.
I made several videogames and participated in numerous hackathons and game jams during my student life. I love talking about computer stuff and science.
I am also involved in social justice issues, such as women's presence in tech and other issues that i hold very important to me.
I like to work with proactive and open-minded people. I consider myself a very social person: I'm always up for grabbing a coffee and talk with interesting people!

certifications: Introduction to Microsoft Azure Cloud Services
Azure Devops: Introduction to CI/CD with Visual Studio
awards: Smart People with Smart Ideas International Award
Ganador en categoria Android del Primer Hackathon organizado en Lleida

experience.description:
Working with the Service Management team in conjunction with the Development team of the Data Analysis branch of Servi Zurich.
My job consists of delivering operational infrastructure and support to the development team and the end users.
The technologies used for my position are React, Git, .NET and Azure.
Working as a React Developer for AVGroup, performing services for ServiZurich, the technological branch of Zurich Insurance Corporation.
Contract work for AR / VR experience development for Ei Community. Currently developing next-gen retail consumer experiences for high-end customers.

Working as a freelance developer for LTS Beratung. Mainly, what i'm doing here consists of backend work with Java. I worked with the following technologies: Java, Postman, Elasticsearch, Kibana, JIRA, SonarQube, Jenkins, Docker, Kubernetes, Confluence.
Developed web applications built with a .NET, MongoDB, Angular.js, Azure and SQL based stack.

I worked as a junior developer for e-tic sistemas at Grupo Godó. My responsibilities here were working on the editorial software Mundo Deportivo's writers are using, based on Java7. Technologies used: Java 7, Apache Velocity, Eidos Media Méthode, Jenkins, Jira, Gitlab.

Teacher at a 2-week (60 hours) winter break course about advanced game development with Unity. I taught concepts like Game Design, Project Management, AMVCC pattern, Shaders, Mobile Market, Editor Tools, etc.

Summer internship. Expanded existing functionalities of Tiendeo's API using C# and Postman. Added new functions to Analytics service. Created bases for a new PDF-parsing and uploading service. Developed a Visual Studio extension using C#.
Internship at the Institute of Research and Agrifood Technologies. Programmed Excel macros using Visual Basic and assisted laboratory personnel.
Game development using Unity3D and C#. Took the majority of Product Design decisions alongside the founder. Participated in the development and design of 4 different projects.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology (BTech), Engineering Technology, General
